title: API Endpoint Configuration
description: Schema for defining API endpoints and their test cases.

name.description: A human-readable name for the endpoint.

path.description: The base path of the endpoint (e.g., '/exportResourcePack').

method.description: The HTTP method for the request.

payload.description: The request body, if applicable (e.g., for POST, PUT).

headers.description: Key-value pairs for request headers common to all test cases for this endpoint.

testCases.description: An array of individual test scenarios for this endpoint.

description.description: A description of the specific test case.

pathOverride.description: An optional path segment to append to the base path (e.g., query parameters).

responseTypeExpected.description: The expected type of the response.

headers.description: Additional or overriding headers specific to this test case.

expectedStatus.description: The expected HTTP status code of the response.

outputFileName.description: The name to save the downloaded file as (required for 'file' type).

expectedContentPartial.description: A substring expected to be present in the response body.

expectedContentExact.description: The exact content expected in the response body (overrides partial if both are present).

expectedLocation.description: The expected URL of the redirect location.
